title: Xeraea nitida
intro: Xeraea nitida, also known as Yerba de la montaña or Mountain yerba, is a shrub-like plant native to the high-altitude regions of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce anxiety. The bioactive constituents of Xeraea nitida include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
